/usr/sbin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/discordc_example.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/discordc_example.dir/examples/basic_bot.c.o -o discordc_example  libdiscordc.a /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libcjson.so.1.7.19 -lm /usr/lib/libwebsockets.so.20 -ldl /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -ldl /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libcap.so
